title: Fix static variable initialization in procedural blocks

features.name: static variable initialization in procedural block with const initializer
features.description: Code should include a static variable declared inside a procedural block (always_ff) with an initializer expression that references a constant parameter

features.name: static and automatic variables in same procedural block
features.description: Code should include both automatic and static variables declared in the same procedural block, where the static accumulates values from the automatic counter
